phases.title: Repo skeleton
phases.verification: pnpm install && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint succeed; CI green on initial commit

phases.title: Shared packages
phases.verification: Each package has smoke tests; all build, lint, and link correctly

phases.title: API skeleton
phases.verification: API boots; security middleware chain integration test passes; rate-limit smoke test passes

phases.title: Web skeleton
phases.verification: E2E: a user can sign up via Clerk, land in app, see 'hello, [name]', sign out

phases.title: Worker skeleton
phases.verification: Worker consumes a test job; retry/backoff demonstrated; Postmark webhook signature verifies

phases.title: Marketing site
phases.verification: Lighthouse 95+ on performance and security headers; CSP report-only mode wired

phases.title: Infrastructure
phases.verification: terraform plan -var-file=dev.tfvars succeeds for both Azure and AWS modules with no errors

phases.title: Documentation
phases.verification: All runbooks linked from docs/index.md; no broken links

phases.title: Acceptance
phases.verification: Every box in NEW_TEMPLATE_PROMPT.md acceptance criteria is checked
